no: Shadowdancer Overhaul by Kaelyn (szaumoor). Redesigns the Shadowdancer kit with new abilities. v1.2.4 (Jan 2026) has only 3 components: cn:100, 5000, 5001. Components 300, 400, 410, 5002, 5003 were planned or existed in earlier versions but are absent from v1.2.4 tp2.

passive.desc: +20 Hide/Move Silently at lv1, +5 every 3 levels
+2 AC (+4 vs missile), bonus movement speed, bonus saves vs Breath
+1 saves vs Spells/Wands/Enchantment/Illusion at lv10, +1 per 12 levels
While invisible: regenerate 1 HP/round, protected from detection except True Sight (lv10)
Immune to magical Darkness spells. Permanent infravision.

activated.effects: Planeshift (enter Shadow Plane ~7 sec, 2x speed, immune to all) or Blink (teleport). On return: backstab from any angle, +THAC0 scaling +1/3 levels, +crit chance.

activated.freq: cooldown (1 turn, -1 round/5 levels, min 2 rounds)

activated.effects: Summons scaling shade: Shadow (lv4), Greater Shadow (lv12), Shadowlord (lv20), Greater Shadowlord (lv28), Nighthaunt (lv36). HD = level-1.
Defensive shadow ability. Upgradeable to Shadow Form via HLA.
Cast at half level: Darkness, Invisibility, Shield, Magic Missile, Sleep.
Cast at half level: Acid Arrow, Web, Minor Globe, Blindness.
Cast at half level: Cone of Cold, Shadow Fireball, Stoneskin, Shadow Door.

restrictions.items: Backstab capped at x4. Only 15 skill points/level. Max 3 weapon pips. No Set Snare. No trap HLAs.

modify: Complete Shadowdancer overhaul with revised abilities and progression

sum: Redesigns the Shadowdancer kit with 8 components. Makes shadow abilities more useful and thematically consistent.

co.no: Core Shadowdancer overhaul. Replaces vanilla kit with new passives, shadow skills, and HLAs. Thief-based kit. Compatible with anything that doesn't modify shadowdancer kit directly. Adds 1 kit slot (replaces existing).

co.n: Make Shaman Spirit Form mirror the benefits of Shadow Form
co.no: Makes Shaman Spirit Form mirror Shadow Form benefits (damage resistance, undispellable invisibility, instant casting). Standalone — doesn't require cn:100. Consistency patch for shamans.
co.tp2n: Make Shaman Spirit Form mirror the benefits of Shadow Form

co.n: Allow vanilla Shadowdancers to take advantage of Rogue Rebalancing's HLA
co.no: Allows VANILLA Shadowdancers to use Rogue Rebalancing's thief HLAs. REQUIRES RR installed first. Only for vanilla Shadowdancer — the overhaul (cn:100) has its own HLAs.
co.tp2n: Allow vanilla shadowdancers to take advantage of Rogue Rebalancing's HLA overhaul

co.n: Make thief THAC0 progression streamlined, and improve up to 6, like clerics
co.no: NOT PRESENT in v1.2.4 tp2 — confirmed by mod_installer. Was present in earlier versions. Do not select.

co.n: Improve the THAC0 of Bards too to match the changes to Thieves
co.no: NOT PRESENT in v1.2.4 tp2 — confirmed by mod_installer. Was present in earlier versions. Do not select.

co.n: Give a selection of items extra hidden traits if wielded/worn by Shadowdancers
co.no: NOT PRESENT in v1.2.4 tp2 — confirmed by mod_installer (exit code 6). Was present in earlier versions. Do not select.

co.n: Fix vanilla shadowdancer bugs (wrong non-proficient penalty, wrong Shadow Twin duration)
co.no: NOT PRESENT in v1.2.4 tp2 — confirmed by mod_installer. Was present in earlier versions. Do not select.

co.n: Fix bugged Simulacrum effect in BG v.2.6.6 (can't detect traps or hide)
co.no: NOT PRESENT in v1.2.4 tp2 — confirmed by mod_installer. Was present in earlier versions. Do not select.
